mapper.sql: SELECT id, business_domain_id, name, ticket_type_id, priority_level_id, calendar_id, first_response_minutes, resolution_minutes, is_urgent_config, breach_action_json, created_at, updated_at FROM sla_rule
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sla_rule ( business_domain_id, name, ticket_type_id, priority_level_id, calendar_id, first_response_minutes, resolution_minutes, is_urgent_config, breach_action_json ) VALUES (#{businessDomainId}, #{name}, #{ticketTypeId}, #{priorityLevelId}, #{calendarId}, #{firstResponseMinutes}, #{resolutionMinutes}, #{isUrgentConfig}, #{breachActionJson})
mapper.update: UPDATE sla_rule SET name = #{name}, ticket_type_id = #{ticketTypeId}, priority_level_id = #{priorityLevelId}, calendar_id = #{calendarId}, first_response_minutes = #{firstResponseMinutes}, resolution_minutes = #{resolutionMinutes}, is_urgent_config = #{isUrgentConfig}, breach_action_json = #{breachActionJson}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND business_domain_id = #{businessDomainId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sla_rule WHERE id = #{id} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId}
mapper.select: SELECT sr.first_response_minutes, sr.resolution_minutes, sr.breach_action_json FROM sla_rule sr LEFT JOIN ticket_priority_level tpl ON tpl.id = sr.priority_level_id WHERE sr.business_domain_id = #{domainId} AND (sr.ticket_type_id = #{ticketTypeId} OR sr.ticket_type_id IS NULL) AND (sr.priority_level_id IS NULL OR tpl.code = #{priorityCode}) ORDER BY sr.priority_level_id IS NOT NULL DESC, sr.ticket_type_id IS NOT NULL DESC, sr.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT priority FROM ticket WHERE id = #{ticketId} LIMIT 1
